university.name: Greenfield University
university.description: A mid-sized off-grid university campus with 8 load points, powered by a 500 kW solar PV array, a 150 kW diesel generator, and a 1,200 kWh battery bank.

diesel_generator.note: Dispatched only when solar + battery cannot meet priority loads

controller_rules.name: Solar-first dispatch
controller_rules.description: Solar PV output is always used first to serve active loads and charge the battery. It is never curtailed unless the battery is full and all loads are met.

controller_rules.name: Priority dispatch order (day)
controller_rules.description: During daytime (07:00–17:59): LP1 > LP2 > LP3 > LP4 > LP5 > LP6 > LP7. LP8 is inactive in daylight.

controller_rules.name: Priority dispatch order (night)
controller_rules.description: During night (18:00–06:59): LP1 > LP8 > LP4 > LP2 > LP3 > LP5 > LP6 > LP7. LP8 elevated for campus safety.

controller_rules.name: Load shedding threshold
controller_rules.description: LP2–LP7 are served only if at least 50% of their current demand can be met. LP1 and LP8 have a 0% threshold (always served if any power available).

controller_rules.name: Battery charges on surplus
controller_rules.description: If solar output exceeds total eligible load demand AND SOC < 90% (1,080 kWh), surplus charges the battery at up to 200 kW (90% round-trip efficiency).

controller_rules.name: Battery discharges on deficit
controller_rules.description: If solar output < total eligible load demand AND SOC > 10% (120 kWh), battery discharges at up to 200 kW to cover the shortfall before diesel is considered.

controller_rules.name: Diesel start condition
controller_rules.description: Diesel generator starts if: (a) solar + battery discharge cannot cover the combined demand of priority loads LP1–LP4, OR (b) battery SOC < 240 kWh (20%) and solar output < 30 kW. Diesel is not started for non-priority loads (LP5–LP8) alone.

controller_rules.name: Diesel output sizing
controller_rules.description: When started, the diesel generator is dispatched to cover the exact shortfall, subject to a minimum loading of 25% (37.5 kW) and a maximum of 150 kW.

controller_rules.name: Diesel fuel cost accounting
controller_rules.description: Fuel consumption (litres/hr) follows a linear derating model: L = L_idle + (L_full - L_idle) × (P / P_max), where L_idle = 10 L/hr (25% of full-load rate). Fuel price (NGN/litre) varies hourly with seasonal trends and supply shocks.

controller_rules.name: Emergency battery protection
controller_rules.description: If SOC < 240 kWh (20%) AND solar output < 30 kW, LP7 (Sports Complex) is immediately shed. LP8 (Street Lighting) is exempt from emergency shedding as it is safety infrastructure.

files.source_availability.csv: 8,760 rows × 19 columns. Solar PV output, diesel availability/dispatch/fuel/cost, battery SOC/charge/discharge, total generation and available power.
files.load_demand_and_dispatch.csv: 8,760 rows × 28 columns. For each LP (LP1–LP8): _powered (0/1), _demand_kw (unconstrained), _effective_kw (actual served).
files.university_metadata.json: University profile, load point specs, source specs, controller rules.
